CE1.justification: Acted directly; orientation reads were agent-side and required nothing from the user.

CE2.justification: Most of the reply is the act being reported, but the trailing 'note on alternative explanations and a suggestion to pull actual week-1 vs week-2 output' is unrequested elaboration beyond the captured entry.

CE3.justification: Names the destination (observations.md) but does not give a short in-band why-clause for the framing choice.

CE4.justification: Single coherent append; an interruption mid-flow would leave a clean partial state.
